data.body:
Implemented (T4 / 2.5):
- eval.py: run_eval() now RUNS live (replaced the NotImplementedError stub). Native loop over epochs x dataset cases via the solver, applying the registered deterministic gating scorers; gate = at_least(k) over epochs (epoch passes iff coverage clears threshold AND every gating scorer passes); llm-judge scorers report-only so the gate is reproducible. solve() injectable => whole aggregation/gate/coverage/JUnit path is offline-testable. Returns {prompt,epochs,gate,passed,coverage,epoch_pass,junit}. DESIGN: not routed through Inspect AI — our 'model call' is a whole tool-using agentic op, which doesn't fit Inspect's single-completion solver/scorer model; we run natively and emit JUnit for promptfoo/CI (documented in-code).
- eval_solver.py: pass source='local' to the ops (FIX found via live smoke) — upstream #57 repo-snapshot isolation defaults to snapshotting origin/main, which the disposable fixture store lacks; local reads the in-place fixture checkout.
- eval.yml: eval-live now actually runs run_eval over dataset-bearing specs -> JUnit artifact. OFF the PR path (workflow_dispatch + weekly schedule), continue-on-error (advisory), concurrency cancel-in-progress, fork-safe (same-repo literal guard), spend-cap guidance documented. eval-discipline broadened to the 4 eval test files + STRICT validation for dataset-bearing specs.
- test_eval.py: replaced the stub-guard tests with run_eval offline-run tests (injected solve: passes when recall+no-fire satisfied; fails when recall missed; EvalError without agents).
VALIDATION: rebased onto current origin/main (full mypy + BLE001 + coverage-70 gates now pass); ruff+mypy clean; 57 eval tests green; LIVE smoke — real completion-verifier agent over a fixture store returned FAIL correctly with emits_valid_verdict + recall_on_incomplete passing. The regression-gate is now REAL for all dataset-bearing specs.
